selection.criteria: first 50 current rows where helm_candidate.candidate_status == pending_judge after batch009 archive; excludes repair queue, repaired rerun, no-candidate, and already passed rows

blockers: Notice/recommendation/regulation rows mostly collapse to ringed diamond placeholders instead of board, side, arrow, slash, or text/diagram semantics.
Ownship, planned-route, and position-fix rows use generic point diamonds instead of vector, ellipse, box, target, or crosshair reference geometry.
Several structure/production/area rows still use generic diamond or dashed-area placeholders instead of platform, pier, pilot, mine/quarry, or precaution symbols.
Only OBSTRN01, OBSTRN02, and OBSTRN11 preserve the required obstruction class/shape closely enough for automated pass; OBSTRN03 needs color-variant repair.

verdicts.required_change: Redraw NMKRCD01 as the reference-scale yellow recommended-passage diamond, removing the oversized center-ring glyph.
